tenant_include.description: Logical mode: if non-empty, ONLY these tenant names are converted. Overrides tenant_exclude.

tenant_exclude.description: Logical mode: tenant names to skip (system tenants). Ignored when tenant_include is set.

treat_controller_as.description: NS stencil type for APIC controller nodes (physical mode): 'Server' or 'PC'.

spine_leaf_naming.description: Device-name source for fabric nodes: 'name' (fabricNodeIdentP name), 'nodeid' (e.g. leaf-101), or 'name_nodeid'.

border_leaf_node_ids.description: Physical mode: node IDs to force-flag as border leafs when L3Out auto-detection is insufficient.

apic_uplinks_per_leaf.description: Physical mode: how many leafs each APIC dual-homes to when synthesizing APIC<->leaf links.

synthesize_endpoints.description: Physical mode (reserved for Phase 2): create endpoint placeholders + leaf-port L2 bindings from fvRsPathAtt static path bindings.

vlan_base.description: Overlay mode: first synthetic VLAN id used for a BD that has no encap VLAN from fvRsPathAtt static bindings.

max_endpoints_per_epg.description: Overlay/unified: cap on real endpoints (fvCEp) drawn per EPG; excess are noted in the report. Lower for very large fabrics.

emit_bidirectional_flows.description: Flow list: emit both consumer->provider and provider->consumer rows for each contract filter.

color_overrides.description: Map of NS device name -> [R,G,B] to override the role-based colour (reserved).
